title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Central Sanskrit Universities Act, 2020. (2) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 30th April, 2020, vide notification No. S.O. 1263(E), dated 17th April, 2020, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3 (ii).
